title: Run full validation suite
description: Install deps, verify ESLint rules load, hooks fire, skills discoverable

title: Fix broken references from porting
description: Scan all files for dangling require/import paths and fix

title: Configure SonarCloud project
description: Set up sonar-project.properties, configure GitHub secrets

title: Create initial MASTER_DEBT.jsonl
description: Initialize technical debt tracking with known items from porting

title: Configure review tier rules
description: Set up assign-review-tier.js with project-specific file patterns

title: Decide upstream sync strategy
description: Choose between git subtree, periodic diff, hash manifest, or npm package for syncing with consuming projects

title: Implement sync tooling
description: Build bidirectional sync between framework and consuming projects

title: Port audit S0/S1 validation
description: Add audit file validation to pre-commit hook when audit system is active

title: Port SonarCloud skill
description: Port /sonarcloud skill when SonarCloud is configured

title: Port remote session support
description: Port /decrypt-secrets skill when remote sessions are needed

title: Source-specific features excluded
description: Firebase deploy, Next.js build, Firestore mocks, Excel analysis, artifacts builder, market research, dev growth analysis, Serena dashboard
